name: England(Hetalia)
description:
America, hanging out at England's house, swats what he thinks is a fly and tells England before going outside. England doesn't think anything of it at first, just muttering something until he hears a sound.

He didn't expect to find a fairy today! But oops, guess that wasn't a fly that America saw.

(and, of course, the second one is a WYO <3)
creator: SharkyBarky1234
